sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79610" key="pariambw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρῐαμβ-ώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n79610.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">characteristic of the</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">παριαμβίς</foreign>, of the foot ̆ ̄ ̆ ̄ ̄, Diom.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:p.482" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.482</biblScope> </bibl> K.</sense> </entryFree>
